# Copilot Instructions

When generating commit messages for this repository, always use the gitlow standard.

Rules:
- Use the gitlow format required by the team.
- Keep the subject line concise and action-oriented.
- Do not generate free-form commit subjects outside the gitlow format.

Examples (adapt to actual change):
- feat(api): add booking conflict validation
- fix(models): add relation generics for phpstan
- chore(readme): document gitlow commit convention
